title: thelypteris orthocaulis
intro: Thelypteris orthocaulis, also known as the Rock Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Thelypteris orthocaulis include its potential to help alleviate digestive issues, boost the immune system, and lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and optimal preparation methods.
